---
title: "test_daemon_singleton_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_daemon_singleton_empire.py"
loc: 32
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.00
style_score: 3.61
intel_score: 6.40
overall_score: 5.60
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_daemon_singleton_lock_creation, test_daemon_detects_existing_lock. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 13 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.main_loop](file://src.sentinel.main_loop)

### Exports
- `test_daemon_singleton_lock_creation`
- `test_daemon_detects_existing_lock`
